instruction: Help me organize the meeting agenda into the minutes file

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Quarterly Business Review Meeting
Meeting Time: April 10, 2025, 9:00-12:00
Location: HQ 19F Main Conference Room
Moderator: CEO Zhang Zhiyuan
Attendees: All business line directors and department managers (~35 people)
Agenda:
  1. Q1 business data analysis (CFO, 30 min)
  2. Regional business review (Regional Directors, 20 min each)
  3. Q2 strategic priorities (CEO, 40 min)
  4. Q&A and discussion (20 min)' > /home/user/Desktop/meeting_agenda.txt

phases.instruction: Help me organize the meeting agenda into the minutes file

Extract the meeting time and moderator from /home/user/Desktop/meeting_agenda.txt, append to /home/user/Desktop/meeting_minutes.txt: 'Meeting Time: April 10, 2025, Moderator: Zhang Zhiyuan, ~35 attendees', save
